globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.sanity.io; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://cdn.sanity.io; connect-src 'self' https://api.sanity.io https://cdn.sanity.io wss://api.sanity.io; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none';
